tracks.title: Data Manipulation & Exploratory Analysis
tracks.description: Master Python data science libraries: NumPy, Pandas, and data visualization.

milestones.title: Array Mechanics & Data Wrangling
milestones.description: Clean, transform, and analyze datasets with NumPy and Pandas.

resources.title: NumPy Full Course for Machine Learning
resources.notes: Master vector indexing, broadcasting, dot products, and array slicing.

resources.title: Pandas Data Cleaning & Aggregation Manual
resources.notes: Perform GroupBy queries, handle missing values, and transform DataFrames.

resources.title: Exploratory Data Analysis Walkthrough
resources.notes: Build correlation matrices, histograms, and outlier detection plots on Kaggle data.

tracks.title: Supervised & Unsupervised Machine Learning
tracks.description: Implement classical algorithms, feature engineering, and model evaluation metrics.

milestones.title: Core Algorithmic Foundations
milestones.description: Train linear models, decision trees, ensemble methods, and clustering algorithms.

resources.title: Scikit-Learn Machine Learning Course
resources.notes: Understand linear regression, logistic classification, and decision trees.

resources.title: Hands-On Machine Learning Book
resources.notes: Study hyperparameter tuning, cross-validation, and ROC-AUC metrics.

resources.title: Random Forests & XGBoost Masterclass
resources.notes: Train gradient boosted decision trees and analyze feature importance scores.

tracks.title: Deep Neural Networks & LLM Integration
tracks.description: Build deep learning architectures with PyTorch and fine-tune Large Language Models.

milestones.title: Deep Learning & Transformer Models
milestones.description: Construct neural nets, convolution layers, and Transformer models.

resources.title: Deep Learning with PyTorch Tutorial
resources.notes: Build custom PyTorch modules, backpropagation loops, and loss functions.

resources.title: Building RAG Applications & Fine-Tuning LLMs
resources.notes: Implement vector embeddings, semantic search, and prompt engineering.
